comments.author: @AmazingGlobalDiscoveries
comments.text: Viking heritage runs so deep here, and Icelandic women are famously independent and resilient in both business and daily life. What I really love about this place is that there are no mosquitoes! I hate mosquitoes and the buzzing sound they make. You can totally hang out in shorts and a t-shirt and get a good night's sleep without worrying about getting attacked by mosquitoes.
